title: Small Pickaxes
description: Makes Pickaxes smaller for better visibility
body:
🪓 Small Pickaxes – A Minimalist Tool Overhaul
Tired of giant tools blocking your view? Small Pickaxes is a lightweight texture pack that shrinks pickaxe models to be more compact and less intrusive while mining. Perfect for players who want a cleaner HUD and better visibility without changing the core Minecraft aesthetic.

✅ Features:
✔️ Smaller pickaxe models for all materials (wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite)

✔️ Consistent with vanilla textures and style

✔️ Great for PvP, building, or casual survival

✔️ Works with the newest Minecraft version

📦 Compatibility:
Minecraft Java Edition

**Part of the series small tools, small swords is already available for download** 

Resource-pack friendly

No mods required

Whether you're speedrunning, building, or just mining in peace, Small Pickaxes brings clarity to your game without compromising style.
